title: PvpHud
description: A very simple but amazing PvpHud with all of the essentials that you need, including fps, ping, cords, and an armor hud. You can also use the new gui to move everything to your needs!
body:
🔔 PvPHud by Meqxs — Major Update!

Plugin Overview:
	
    •	PvPHud is a lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to give players a clear PvP advantage.
	
    •	Displays essential real-time HUD info including:
    
    •	⚔️ Armor & durability
	
    •	📶 Ping
	
    •	🎮 FPS

🆕 What’s New in This Update:
	
    •	✨ Fully Customizable GUI
	
    •	Drag and place HUD elements anywhere on your screen.
	
    •	Default keybind to open the GUI: H

🛡️ Movable HUD Elements:
	
    •	Armor HUD
	
    •	Ping
	
    •	FPS
	
    •	Coordinates
	
    •	TPS (Ticks Per Second)
	
    •	Biome Info

Enjoy a cleaner, more personalized PvP experience with full control over your HUD layout!
